response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song title 'Ridin' on Dreams' from on-screen text at 02:12.
2. Identified performer group as 'hololive IDOL PROJECT' from on-screen text and context.
3. Used search query: '"Ridin\' on Dreams" hololive Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Received reliable lyrics from multiple sources (Genius, plyric, L-Hit).
5. Mapped the song to the entire video, treating the introduction screens and stage performance as one continuous musical event.
response.global_summary: The video is a continuous live performance of the song 'Ridin' on Dreams', the theme song for the 'hololive 7th fes.' event, featuring an ensemble of Hololive VTubers performing on stage with a large audience.

scenes.description: Audience waving light sticks in a large arena, followed by character introduction screens featuring various Hololive members. The song 'Ridin' on Dreams' plays continuously.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえ、君がいたからだよ
ねえ、ありがとうを何度も
今すぐに伝えたいんだ
さあ乗り込もう！
Ridin' on dreams, yeah!
Woah, oh-oh, woah, oh-oh
Hey! (Hey!) Hey! (Hey!) Yeah!
あぁ 小さな夢から
想像できないような
想いになったんだ
わくわく止まらない
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, it's because of you
Hey, thank you again and again
I want to tell you right now
Come on, let's get on board!
Ridin' on dreams, yeah!
Woah, oh-oh, woah, oh-oh
Hey! (Hey!) Hey! (Hey!) Yeah!
Ah, from a small dream
It's like I can't imagine
It's become a feeling
I can't stop being excited!

scenes.description: A live performance of the ensemble group 'hololive IDOL PROJECT' on stage, continuing the song 'Ridin' on Dreams'. The crowd is highly engaged with their light sticks.
